The conversation should steer towards topics which reveal information about the characters and who they are, or instead drive forward previous conversations in their memory.

**Late visual context as seen by MJR (the player): The scene depicts a snowy landscape under a night sky with a purple and blue aurora. In the foreground, a large bow is visible, suggesting that the viewpoint is from the character wielding it. Three humanoid figures are present in the scene: two on the left and right sides, and one in the center. The central figure appears to be glowing and is surrounded by a bright light, while the other two figures seem to be injured or dead, lying on the ground with blood around them. The atmosphere of the scene is dark and ominous, with the presence of the aurora adding an otherworldly element. The overall mood is tense and foreboding.**
Lydia: Hah! Look at that Imperial bitch bleed!
